name: QRadar Audit: Expensive CRE Rules
notes: This rule triggers when QRadar rules are expensive. Optimize those rules to reduce load in CRE and reduce a chance that some events will not be correlated by CRE.
conditions_text: when the event matches QID is 38,750,120
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Expensive CRE Rules on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches QID is 38,750,120
RED_list: Event description: Detects when QRadar rules are expensive. Optimize those rules to reduce load in CRE and reduce a chance that some events will not be correlated by CRE.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
